economic_ownership_map.label: Look-through listed and private holdings

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

low.label: LTM direct-investment and operating DE (60% of consolidated DE)

source.locator: LTM DE $2.54/sh × 60% direct+operating split; DE definition and LTM per Q1-26 supplemental

low.label: Reinvestment rate on direct/operating owner earnings
low.rationale: Brookfield redeploys capital into client strategies and operating platforms; base aligns with Lawrence 8% DE growth path.

low.label: Incremental after-tax return on reinvested capital
low.rationale: Real-asset and private-markets reinvestment history; bounded below listed holdco discount stress.

low.label: Owner-cash discount rate
low.rationale: Platform holdco risk premium; low case uses higher discount (lower value).

low.label: Terminal owner-earnings multiple (year 7)
low.rationale: Matches Lawrence base 16× exit on consolidated DE with modest premium for direct/operating slice.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, owner_cash_y7, 7, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Filing-backed proof: LTM DE $2.54/sh (BN/investor-documents/ir-bn/2026-Q1-BN-Supplemental-vF-2.pdf); diluted shares 2367.8M (BN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/40-F_20260318_rpt20251231_acc0001001085_26_000006.htm). Component overlap_key=core_engine.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

low.label: Parent corporate net cash, debt, preferred and tax claims
low.rationale: Corporate-center claims only; consolidated $16.2B cash and $14.3B borrowings are not added to avoid double-count with look-through holdings. Base is illustrative pending parent-only 40-F carve-out [HUMAN REVIEW].

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Corporate cash, debt, preferred, and tax claims

source_lineage.locator: LTM DE $2.54/sh × 60% direct+operating split; DE definition and LTM per Q1-26 supplemental
LTM DE $2.54/sh × 40% FRE/wealth slice; DE from AM and Wealth Solutions distributions

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
